query:
UPDATE projects SET 
  videoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NogJrFYaUMQ',
  builderDescription = 'Paranjape Schemes (Construction) Ltd. is one of Pune''s oldest and most respected real estate developers, established in 1987. With over 35 years of excellence, they have delivered 60+ landmark projects including the iconic Blue Ridge Township. Known for their integrated townships, sustainable development, and community-focused approach, Paranjape has transformed Pune''s skyline. Their projects are characterized by thoughtful planning, green spaces, and world-class amenities.',
  builderLogo = '/images/partners/paranjape-schemes.png',
  builderEstablished = 1987,
  builderProjects = 60
WHERE id = 5;
